mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite (user_id, target_type, target_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
